case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC.A CORP. VS. SALEMA M CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANTHONY L. HEAD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-14-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-29-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY HINDS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO VACATE ORDER OF SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 5/14/2002 TO ANTHONY L. HEAD, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY ELLEN SCHERER. (212)
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE SANCTIONS ISSUED ON 5/14/02.
